---
title: "doughnut"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
doughnut2015 <- read_csv("Tim_Kashkarov/doughnut2015.csv")
doughnut2015unadj <- read_csv("Tim_Kashkarov/doughnut2015unadj.csv")
doughnuttime <- read_csv("Tim_Kashkarov/doughnuttime.csv")
```


# time column fix
```{r}
fix_time <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)

  sapply(x, function(t) {
    p <- strsplit(t, ":", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]

    if (length(p) == 3 && p[3] == "00") {
      # mm:ss:00  ->  00:mm:ss
      sprintf("00:%02d:%02d", as.integer(p[1]), as.integer(p[2]))

    } else if (length(p) == 3) {
      # hh:mm:ss  -> pad to 2 digits
      sprintf("%02d:%02d:%02d",
              as.integer(p[1]), as.integer(p[2]), as.integer(p[3]))

    } else {
      NA_character_
    }
  })
}

doughnut2015$Time <- fix_time(doughnut2015$Time)
doughnut2015unadj$Time <- fix_time(doughnut2015unadj$Time)
```


# time_sec culumn
```{r}
doughnut2015$time_sec <- as.numeric(as.difftime(doughnut2015$Time, format = "%H:%M:%S", units = "secs"))

doughnut2015unadj$time_sec <- as.numeric(as.difftime(doughnut2015unadj$Time, format = "%H:%M:%S", units = "secs"))
```


# time diff
```{r}
library(dplyr)

df_diff <- doughnut2015 |>
  inner_join(doughnut2015unadj |> select('Race Number', time_sec),
             by = "Race Number",
             suffix = c("_1", "_2")) |>
  mutate(time_diff_sec = time_sec_2 - time_sec_1)

df_diff <- df_diff |>
  rename(
    time_sec_adjusted   = time_sec_1,
    time_sec_unadjusted = time_sec_2
  )
```


# doughnut table
```{r}
library(lubridate)

doughnuttime$Bonus <- as.numeric(hms(doughnuttime$Bonus))
df_diff$Donut <- findInterval(df_diff$time_diff_sec, doughnuttime$Bonus)
```


# results
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(df_diff, aes(x = Donut)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#d95f02") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Donuts Eaten",
    x = "Number of Donuts",
    y = "Number of Runners"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# ggplot(df_diff, aes(x = time_sec_unadjusted, y = time_sec_adjusted)) +
#  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
#  labs(
#    title = "Original vs Adjusted Time",
#    x = "Original Time (sec)",
#    y = "Adjusted Time (sec)"
#  ) +
#  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
df_diff$rank_group <- cut(df_diff$Position, breaks = c(0,10,50,100,260))

ggplot(df_diff, aes(x = rank_group, y = Donut)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Donuts by Finish Group",
    x = "Finish Group",
    y = "Donuts"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(df_diff, aes(x = Donut, y = time_sec_adjusted)) +
  geom_point(fill = "#d95f02") +
  geom_smooth() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Donuts Eaten",
    x = "Number of Donuts",
    y = "Time Adj"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
df_diff2 <- df_diff |> filter(Donut > 0)
ggplot(df_diff2, aes(x = Donut, y = time_sec_adjusted)) +
  geom_point(fill = "#d95f02") +
  geom_smooth() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Donuts Eaten without non-eaters",
    x = "Number of Donuts",
    y = "Time Adj"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
quad_model <- lm(time_sec_adjusted ~ Donut + I(Donut^2), data = df_diff2)
summary(quad_model)

b <- coef(quad_model)
opt_donuts <- -b["Donut"] / (2 * b["I(Donut^2)"])
opt_donuts

```
# male vs. female
```{r}
ggplot(df_diff, aes(x = Donut, y = time_sec_adjusted)) +
  geom_point(fill = "#d95f02") +
  geom_smooth() +
  geom_smooth(method = lm, formula = y ~ poly(x, 2), colour = "green") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Donuts Eaten without non-eaters",
    x = "Number of Donuts",
    y = "Time Adj"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(~Gender, ncol=1)
```
